subtitle_id: Ikan terbesar di dunia yang ramah

sections.body_id: Hiu paus adalah ikan terbesar di seluruh dunia! Walaupun namanya hiu, ia lembut dan tidak berbahaya bagi manusia. Ia disebut hiu paus karena tubuhnya besar dan cara makannya menyaring air laut seperti paus. Di Indonesia ia juga dipanggil hiu tutul karena punggungnya bertotol.
sections.body_en: The whale shark is the biggest fish in the whole world! Even though it is a shark, it is gentle and harmless to people. It is called a whale shark because of its huge body and the way it eats by filtering seawater, just like a whale. In Indonesia it is also called 'hiu tutul' because of the spots on its back.

sections.body_id: Hiu paus berenang di lautan tropis yang hangat di seluruh dunia. Ia suka mengembara jauh dan termasuk ikan yang suka bermigrasi. Di Indonesia, hiu paus bisa ditemui di banyak tempat penyelaman. Ia bahkan bisa menyelam sangat dalam ke dasar laut.
sections.body_en: The whale shark swims in warm, tropical oceans all around the world. It loves to wander far and is a fish that migrates. In Indonesia, whale sharks can be spotted at many diving spots. It can even dive very deep down into the sea.

sections.body_id: Tubuh hiu paus berwarna abu-abu dengan perut putih. Punggungnya penuh bintik dan garis putih kekuningan yang tampak seperti taburan bintang di langit. Pola bintik ini berbeda pada setiap hiu, seperti sidik jari. Mulutnya sangat lebar dan datar di ujung kepalanya.
sections.body_en: The whale shark's body is gray with a white belly. Its back is covered in yellowish-white spots and stripes that look like stars sprinkled across the sky. This spot pattern is different on every shark, like a fingerprint. Its mouth is very wide and flat at the front of its head.

sections.body_id: Hiu paus makan dengan cara menyaring air laut lewat mulutnya yang besar. Makanan kesukaannya adalah plankton, yaitu makhluk laut yang sangat kecil. Ia berenang pelan dengan mulut terbuka lebar, lalu air keluar lewat insang dan makanan tertinggal. Walau giginya banyak, ia tidak memakainya untuk mengunyah.
sections.body_en: The whale shark eats by filtering seawater through its big mouth. Its favorite food is plankton, which are tiny sea creatures. It swims slowly with its mouth wide open, then water flows out through its gills while the food stays behind. Even though it has many teeth, it does not use them to chew.

sections.body_id: Hiu paus sangat ramah, kadang membiarkan penyelam berenang di dekatnya. Ia bisa hidup sampai 70 tahun dan dipercaya sudah ada sejak 60 juta tahun lalu. Sayangnya, ia bisa terancam karena tertangkap jaring nelayan. Yuk, kita jaga laut tetap bersih agar raksasa lembut ini terus berenang bahagia!
sections.body_en: The whale shark is very friendly and sometimes lets divers swim near it. It can live up to 70 years and is believed to have existed since 60 million years ago. Sadly, it can be in danger from getting caught in fishing nets. Let's keep our oceans clean so this gentle giant can keep swimming happily!

facts.id: Hiu paus adalah ikan terbesar di dunia!
facts.en: The whale shark is the biggest fish in the world!
It can live up to 70 years.

facts.id: Pola bintik di punggungnya unik, seperti sidik jari.
facts.en: The spots on its back are unique, like a fingerprint.
Its mouth can be very wide for filtering food!

facts.id: Walau besar, hiu paus jinak dan tidak berbahaya.
facts.en: Despite its size, the whale shark is tame and harmless.

facts.id: Hiu paus suka makan plankton yang sangat kecil.
facts.en: Whale sharks love eating tiny plankton.
